# Parallel POC Deployment Folder

This directory contains the synchronized metadata and content for the **Parallel POC** Power Pages site.

## ⚠️ DO NOT EDIT DIRECTLY
All changes must be implemented in the `austroads-power-pages/` directory and synchronized using the `npm run sync` script.

## Metadata Summary
- **Website Name**: Data Hub - Parallel POC
- **Website ID**: `a1b2c3d4-e5f6-4a5b-8c9d-0e1f2a3b4c5d`
- **Environment ID**: `8bbd70f6-0473-e968-9748-b73f7eed2fc4` (Production)

## Deployment
This folder is targeted by the `.github/workflows/deploy-poc.yml` workflow. 
- **Trigger**: Manual dispatch only.
- **Action**: Uses direct PAC CLI commands to push the manifest and components to Dataverse.
